summary.hands_instructions: CRITICAL: Full IMAP sweep on 2026-04-22 morning (07:00 target) before any send. Seventeen days of replies may be unread. Resolve Claire/Rob/Tom outcomes first — update value_delivery_queue.json immediately. Check each cold-sequence lead individually before their breakup fires. Any cold reply found: classify, add to new_replies.json, cancel relevant breakup, re-route. Easter weekend is historically a period when busy owners finally reply to outstanding emails they've been meaning to answer — do not assume silence.
